refined_caption: The hospital waiting room is overcrowded with patients sitting on the floor. There is a lack of available seating.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was shocked to see the waiting room was extremely crowded, with many patients forced to sit on the floor. This is not only uncomfortable but also unsanitary. The hospital should provide more seating and improve the waiting area conditions.
voice_text: The waiting room is super crowded, people are sitting on the floor, it's really uncomfortable and not clean.
